description: Active ransomware on production file processing worker node — LockBit variant
notes: CrowdStrike auto-isolated. No customer data encrypted.

description: Unauthorized IAM role assumption — CloudTrail alert for AssumeRole from unrecognized IP

description: Employee forwarded sensitive internal document to personal email

description: Suspicious bulk API key generation from admin console — investigation revealed authorized load test
